title: Suspicious Sand
description: Makes suspicious sand and gravel easier to spot with a clear star design.
body:
# **<u>Better Suspicious Sand</u>**

Better Suspicious Sand is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that makes suspicious sand and suspicious gravel easier to find while keeping the vanilla look and feel intact.
It adds a subtle, clean star marker to suspicious blocks so you can quickly spot them during archaeology and desert exploration without breaking immersion. Ideal for players who want a simple, vanilla-friendly way to find trail ruins loot more efficiently.
![Before/After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e8a1f66f8d17e2bf228e41217b849998a2c3fd.jpeg)

## Features

* Highlighted suspicious sand and suspicious gravel
* Clean star design overlay for easy visibility
* Improves archaeology gameplay and treasure hunting
* Vanilla-style textures that blend naturally
* Lightweight with no performance impact
* No mods required (resource pack only)

![67](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83f249c72a49ca6d6b58a90e133fafca718d29ec.png)
## Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+
* Works with most resource packs and shaders
* Designed to match vanilla textures

> Other texture packs used in these pictures:
[Saturated MC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/saturated-mc)
---

If you enjoy this pack and want to support future updates, consider supporting via PayPal.
